query:
SELECT 
  MIN(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)) AS min_years,
  MAX(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)) AS max_years,
  ROUND(AVG(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)), 1) AS avg_years,
  COUNT(*) AS total_employees
FROM employees e
WHERE e.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM requests)
  AND e.seniority_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
  MIN(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)) AS min_years,
  MAX(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)) AS max_years,
  ROUND(AVG(FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25)), 1) AS avg_years,
  COUNT(*) AS total_employees
FROM employees e
WHERE e.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM requests)
  AND e.seniority_date IS NOT NULL;
